name: gem-swarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration — 20 domain specialists, 42 skills, native parallel subagents, persistent sessions, autonomous 4-phase workflow

settings.name: Disabled Agents
settings.description: Comma-separated list of agent names to exclude from planning.

settings.name: Max Retries
settings.description: Maximum retry attempts per phase before escalating to user.

settings.name: Auto Archive
settings.description: Automatically archive session state on successful completion (true/false).

settings.name: State Directory
settings.description: Base directory for session state and plans (default: docs/gem-swarm).

settings.name: Max Concurrent
settings.description: Maximum subagents in one native parallel batch (0 = full batch).

settings.name: Git Checkpoints
settings.description: Auto-create git stash checkpoints before file modifications (true/false). Default: true.

SessionStart.name: gem-swarm-session-start
SessionStart.description: Initialize hook state and prune stale sessions

BeforeAgent.name: gem-swarm-before-agent
BeforeAgent.description: Inject session context into agent turns

BeforeTool.name: gem-swarm-git-checkpoint
BeforeTool.description: Create git stash checkpoint before file modifications

AfterAgent.name: gem-swarm-after-agent
AfterAgent.description: Validate handoff report format with retry on malformed output

SessionEnd.name: gem-swarm-session-end
SessionEnd.description: Clean up hook state for ended session
